PlayStation 2 (Platform)

All Games Best Games


The PlayStation 2 (PS2), is a home video game console that was manufactured by Sony Computer Entertainment. The sixth-generation console competed with the Sega Dreamcast, Microsoft Xbox, and Nintendo GameCube. The PlayStation 2 went on to become the best-selling video game console in history, selling over 155 million units. More than 3,874 game titles have been released for the PS2 since launch, and more than 1.5 bi... Read more


Release dates:
2000-11-24 (EU)
2003-12-20 (CH)

Memory32 MBStoragePlaystation 2 Memory Card (8 MB), Playstation 1 Memory Card (1 MB)
GraphicsGraphics Synthesizer @ 147.456 MHzSoundCPU+SPU2
Online serviceDynamic Network Authentication SystemOutputComposite video, S-Video, RGB, VGA, YPBPR
Supported Resolutions480i, 480pConnectivity100 Mbit Ethernet/modem (Add-on), 2x USB 1.1

Other versions

Slimline

The PS2 is primarily differentiated between models featuring the original "fat" case design and "slimline" models, which were introduced at the end of 2004.

    IGDB Press Kit
    IGDB is operated by Twitch

    Accept cookies to help improve this website

    IGDB uses data collected on our services, including through technologies such as cookies, to remember who you are, remember your preferences, and analyze usage to improve our products. By clicking "Accept Cookies", you agree to this activity. Click "Manage Cookies" to decline cookies.Cookie Notice

    Cookie Preferences

    We use cookies and similar tools (collectively, “cookies”) for the purposes described below and will apply your cookie preferences on this device. You might be asked to provide your consent again if you use another device.
    Cookie Notice

    Operational cookies and data usage

    Always Active

    Operational cookies are used to provide our services and cannot be disabled.

    For example, we use these types of cookies to:

    • Recognize you when you sign in to use our services
    • Present relevant content, providing other customized features and services
    • Prevent fraudulent activity and improve security
    • Keep track of your preferences to provide a more positive user experience
    • Gather data (restricted to IGDB) through IGDB-owned cookies in order to improve IGDB content, products, and services and to measure and understand the performance of our services

    While most operational cookies are owned and managed by IGDB, in limited cases, we work with trusted third parties who use cookies to enable their services - refer to our Cookie Notice for additional detail.

    Performance Cookies

    These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

    Advertising/Marketing Cookies and data usage

    IGDB does not use cookies for advertising or marketing. However, third-party marketing cookies may be present due to features like embedded videos.

    Performance Cookies
